case_title: LYNN JULIAN VS. AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-07-2017 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-07-2017 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF LYNN JULIAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH IS PRESENT. REPRESENTED BY BRET SANFORD, AUTOMOTIVE SERVICE DAMAGE SPECIALIST. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK: J. MURPHY; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY JULIAN, LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-07-2017 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JULIAN, LYNN AS TO DEFENDANT AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SIGNED SERVED FEB-28-2017, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-07-2017 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JULIAN, LYNN IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT AAA NORTHERN CALIFORNIA, NEVADA & UTAH THERE WAS NO EVIDENCE THAT ANY ACT OR OMISSION BY THE DEFENDANT WAS A CAUSE OF DAMAGE, LOSS OR HARM TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 4/10/17. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER-NO MAIL RECEPTACLE-UNABLE TO FORWARD."
